message:
chore(beads): sync issue tracker state and update certification artifacts

Update .beads/issues.jsonl with latest issue metadata changes from
concurrent agent activity (status transitions, field updates).

Refresh certification gate artifacts under tests/full_suite_gate/:
- certification_events.jsonl: updated event log entries
- certification_report.md: refreshed report timestamp/content
- certification_verdict.json: updated verdict fields
- full_suite_events.jsonl: updated full suite event log
- full_suite_report.md: refreshed full suite report
- full_suite_verdict.json: updated verdict metadata
- preflight_verdict.json: refreshed preflight check results
- waiver_audit.json: updated waiver audit trail

These are generated artifacts from the CI certification pipeline that
track the current test suite health and gate status.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
